1=纯满幅；>1 加侧栏小图: 1 = full-bleed only; >1 adds a sidebar thumbnail.

巨幅数字旁的竖向强调标尺。: The vertical accent ruler beside the giant number.
巨幅序号所在的一侧。: The side the giant number sits on.
巨数下方的小指标数量（0 = 隐藏）: Number of small metrics below the giant number (0 to hide).
巨型数字：实心(带投影) / 描边(空心轮廓): Giant number style: solid (with shadow) or outline (hollow contour).
巨型数字面板放在左或右: Place the giant-number panel on the left or right.
巨型数字与文案的对齐方向。: Alignment direction of the giant number and text.
巨型章节编号(及背景幽灵数字)的显示/隐藏: Show/hide the giant section number (and background ghost numeral).
句末的箭头母题。: Arrow motif at the end of the sentence.
句首的巨号下沉首字（仅左对齐生效）。: Giant-size drop cap at the start of the sentence (applies only when left-aligned).
句中嵌入的巨号暖橙数字（关闭则回退为普通字号）。: Giant warm-orange number embedded in the sentence (falls back to normal size when off).
聚焦方块 / 导语 / 页脚强调色: Focused tile / intro text / footer accent color.
聚焦流 / 导语 / 页脚强调色: Focused flow / intro text / footer accent color.
聚焦气泡 / 导语 / 页脚强调色: Focused bubble / intro text / footer accent color.
聚焦线 / 导语 / 页脚强调色: Focused line / intro text / footer accent color.
聚焦行 / 导语 / 页脚强调色: Accent color for the focused row / lead-in / footer.
均匀分布(对角)参考线的显示/隐藏: Show/hide the evenly distributed (diagonal) reference line.
均值位置的竖线标记。: Vertical line marking the mean position.
卡面叠印标题/图说: Title/caption overprinted on the card face.
卡内装饰引号显隐: Toggle the decorative quotation mark inside the card.
卡片标题点 / 刻度强调的主题色（不改系列自身配色）。: Theme color for the card title dot / scale emphasis (does not change each series' own colors).
卡片导读一句话: One-line teaser text for the card.
卡片底部的数值标注。: Value label at the bottom of the card.
卡片底部的英文职能标签。: English role label at the bottom of the card.
卡片底部小标签: Small label at the bottom of the card.
卡片底部一句注脚: One-line footnote at the bottom of the card.
卡片角上的两字母代号。: Two-letter code in the corner of the card.
卡片宽度按数值分配（整行即一条资金分布）；关闭则等宽。: Card width allocated by value (the row reads as a fund distribution); off makes all cards equal width.
卡片内标签显隐: Toggle the label inside the card.
卡片内的抽象色块构图。: Abstract color-block composition inside the card.
卡片内的状态等级标识（高 / 中 / 低）。: Status level indicator inside the card (High / Medium / Low).
卡片上半部分的一对关键指标。: A pair of key metrics in the upper half of the card.
卡片上的确定性强度条显隐。: Show or hide the certainty-intensity bar on the card.
卡片上数值数字的显示（关闭则只看占比）。: Show value figures on the cards (when off, only the share is shown).
卡片是否带随机倾斜角: Whether cards have a random tilt angle.
卡片网格的列数: Number of columns in the card grid.
卡片网格每行的列数。: Number of columns per row in the card grid.
卡片右上角的两位序号。: Two-digit index in the top-right corner of the card.
卡片右下角的大号代号。: Large code number in the bottom-right corner of the card.
卡片左右交错排布（关闭则全部排在右侧，节点靠左成竖排清单）。: Cards alternate left and right (when off, all cards sit on the right with nodes forming a left-aligned vertical list).
开启标题、数字和图表重点元素的流光渐变。: Turn on the flowing gradient shimmer for the title, numbers, and key chart elements.
开启后榜首点亮为暖橙并放大圆点，其余弱化。: When enabled, lights the top item in warm orange with an enlarged dot and dims the rest.
开启后榜首放大并点亮为暖橙，其余弱化。: When enabled, enlarges the top entry and lights it up in warm orange while dimming the rest.
开启后第一步点亮为暖橙。: When enabled, lights the first step in warm orange.
开启后第一个数据格点亮为暖橙。: When enabled, lights the first data tile in warm orange.
开启后点亮其中一栏，另一栏弱化为「现状」。: When enabled, lights up one column while the other dims as the "current state".
开启后高亮当前章节（编号着色 + 箭头），其余保持低调。: When enabled, highlights the current chapter (colored number plus arrow); the rest stay muted.
开启后高亮某一对比项，其余弱化。: When enabled, highlights one comparison item and dims the rest.
开启后高亮某一画格的边框与说明。: When enabled, highlights one frame's border and caption.
开启后高亮某一明细行，其余弱化。: When enabled, highlights one detail row and dims the rest.
开启后高亮某一模块行。: When enabled, highlights one module row.
开启后高亮某一行，其余弱化。: When enabled, highlights one row and dims the rest.
开启后高亮某一张套餐为主推方案。: When enabled, highlights one plan as the featured option.
开启后弱化「参考基准」多边形，突出「燃点」。: When enabled, dims the "Benchmark" polygon and highlights "Ignite".
开启后弱化非重点气泡，突出燃点主推举措。: When enabled, dims non-key bubbles and highlights Ignite's featured initiative.
开启后弱化竞品气泡，突出「燃点」自身。: When enabled, dims competitor bubbles and highlights "Ignite" itself.
开启后首行点亮为暖橙，其余弱化。: When enabled, lights the first row in warm orange and dims the rest.
开启后突出某一标注，其余弱化。: When enabled, highlights one callout and dims the rest.
开启后突出某一步骤，其余弱化。: When enabled, highlights one step and dims the rest.
开启后突出某一层，其余弱化。: When enabled, highlights one tier and dims the rest.
开启后突出某一词条，其余弱化。: When enabled, highlights one term and dims the rest.
开启后突出某一对，其余弱化。: When enabled, highlights one pair and dims the rest.
开启后突出某一个环，其余弱化。: When enabled, highlights one ring and dims the rest.
开启后突出某一个流程节点，其余弱化。: When enabled, highlights one process node and dims the rest.
开启后突出某一个数字，其余弱化。: When enabled, highlights one figure and dims the rest.
开启后突出某一根价值柱，其余弱化。: When enabled, highlights one value bar and dims the rest.
开启后突出某一环节，其余弱化。: When enabled, highlights one stage and dims the rest.
开启后突出某一阶段，其余弱化。: When enabled, highlights one stage and dims the rest.
开启后突出某一里程碑，其余弱化。: When enabled, highlights one milestone and dims the rest.
开启后突出某一屏，其余弱化。: When enabled, highlights one screen and dims the rest.
开启后突出某一区块，其余弱化。: When enabled, highlights one block and dims the rest.
开启后突出某一渠道，其余弱化。: When enabled, highlights one channel and dims the rest.
开启后突出某一条标注，其余弱化。: When enabled, highlights one callout and dims the rest.
开启后突出某一条带，其余弱化。: When enabled, highlights one strip and dims the rest.
开启后突出某一条导览，其余弱化。: When enabled, emphasizes a specific navigation item; the rest are dimmed.
开启后突出某一条服务，其余弱化。: When enabled, highlights one service and dims the rest.
开启后突出某一条辅助数据，其余弱化。: When enabled, emphasizes a specific supporting-data item; the rest are dimmed.
开启后突出某一条目，其余弱化。: When enabled, highlights one item and dims the rest.
开启后突出某一条斜线，其余弱化。: When enabled, highlights one slope line and dims the rest.
开启后突出某一条原则，其余弱化。: When enabled, highlights one principle and dims the rest.
开启后突出某一项指标，其余弱化。: When enabled, highlights one metric and dims the rest.
开启后突出某一行群组，其余弱化。: When enabled, highlights one cohort row and dims the rest.
开启后突出某一序列，其余弱化。: When enabled, highlights one series and dims the rest.
开启后突出某一增量步骤，其余弱化。: When enabled, highlights one incremental step and dims the rest.
开启后突出某一张卡，其余弱化。: When enabled, highlights one card and dims the rest.
开启后突出某一张数据卡，其余弱化。: When enabled, highlights one data card and dims the rest.
开启后突出某一指标，其余弱化。: When enabled, highlights one metric and dims the rest.
开启后突出最新一根柱子，其余弱化。: When enabled, highlights the latest bar and dims the rest.
开启后一半图片、一半浅色文字面板（半黑半白）。: When enabled, splits the layout into half image, half light text panel (half black, half white).
开启后占比最大的类别点亮为暖橙，图例其余弱化。: When enabled, lights the largest-share category in warm orange and dims the rest of the legend.
开启倾斜散落 / 关闭则整齐排布: Scatters the photos at an angle when enabled, arranges them neatly when off.
开启则铺满为 100% 占比视图，关闭为绝对数值。: When on, fills to a 100% share view; when off, shows absolute values.
刊号、荧光、引述竖条与图片边框的主题色。: Theme color for the issue number, neon highlight, quote bar, and image border.
刊头 / 导语高亮 / 条码强调色: Accent color for the masthead / lead-in highlight / barcode.
刊头牌底部内嵌规格指标条的项数（自动均分）。: Number of embedded spec metric items at the bottom of the header card (auto-divided).
刊头牌右上角贴纸化标签的显示。: Show the sticker-style label in the top right of the header card.
刊头使用实色块或描边样式: Whether the masthead uses a solid block or an outline style.
刊头下方的刊期与署名行。: Issue date and byline row below the masthead.
科研方向票根数量(2–4): Number of research direction ticket stubs (2-4).
可上传二维码图片槽。: An uploadable QR code image slot.
可信度列（强度条 + 数值）的显隐。: Show or hide the confidence column (intensity bar + value).
可选图片槽数量（0–2），按比例自适应；为 0 时不显示图片。: Number of optional image slots (0-2), auto-scaled to ratio; at 0, no image is shown.
客户头像图片槽，关闭时留白占位。: Customer avatar image slot; leaves a blank placeholder when off.
客户与留存指标盘数量（1–2）。: Number of customer and retention metric dials (1–2).
空槽占位与底纹的基调（图片满铺时主要影响占位区）。: The tone of the empty-slot placeholder and background texture (mainly affects the placeholder area when the image fills the frame).
空心「年初」端点与其数值标签的显示。: Whether the hollow “start of year” endpoint and its value label show.
控制颗粒、暗角等氛围叠层。: Controls grain, vignette, and other atmosphere overlays.
口径表格展示的行数量（4–6）。: Number of rows shown in the methodology table (4–6).
口径面板背景：深色 / 强调色块 / 纸色。: Methodology panel background: dark / accent block / paper.
跨周期的平均值虚线。: The dashed average line across periods.
块内数值显隐: Toggle the value inside each block.
块内占比百分比显隐: Toggle the share percentage inside each block.
来源卡占比数值与比例条 显隐: Show/hide the share value and proportion bar on the source card.
来源数值 + 占比显隐: Show/hide the source value and share.
雷达图的能力维度（轴）数量（雷达至少 3 维）。: Number of capability dimensions (axes) in the radar chart (at least 3).
雷达图的能力维度数量: Number of capability dimensions in the radar chart.
雷达图的能力轴数量（多边形边数）。: Number of capability axes on the radar chart (polygon sides).
雷达图的因子轴数量。: Number of factor axes on the radar chart.
雷达网格 / 刻度环(雷达生效): Radar grid / scale rings (applies to radar style).
雷达展示的维度数量: Number of dimensions shown on the radar chart.
累计曲线呈现方式：面积 / 折线。: Style of the cumulative curve: area / line.
累计曲线的呈现：面积 / 折线 / 阶梯: Cumulative curve presentation: area / line / step.
累计曲线的分位节点（Top-N 档位）数量。: Number of percentile nodes (Top-N tiers) on the cumulative curve.
累计曲线的可视化形式: Visualization form of the cumulative curve.
累计曲线上的阶段节点数量(2–5): Number of stage nodes on the cumulative curve (2-5).
累计占比的档位数量: Number of tiers in the cumulative share.
历程的阶段节点数量。: Number of stage nodes in the journey.
连接带中围绕中枢的生态节点数量。: Number of ecosystem nodes around the hub in the connection band.
连接各节点的升降曲线与面积的显示/隐藏: Show/hide the rise-fall curve and area connecting the nodes.
连接线按当前进度着色填充: Connector line colored to fill based on current progress.
连线着色：按排名涨跌（升绿/降红/平墨）/ 按类别色谱 / 单色。: Connector line coloring: by ranking movement (up green / down red / flat ink) / by category spectrum / single color.
链接目录的列数: Number of columns in the link directory.
两侧的大号排名序号。: Large ranking number on both sides.
两侧角标贴纸的显示。: Show corner-badge stickers on both sides.
两侧节点名称标签。: Node name labels on both sides.
两侧人像数量；0=纯文字，1=单侧人像，2=对称双联: Number of portraits on the sides; 0 = text only, 1 = single-side portrait, 2 = symmetric pair.
两端的热度分值 显隐: Show or hide the popularity scores at both ends.
两端数值显隐: Toggle the value at both ends.
两端条目名称显隐: Toggle the item name at both ends.
两端圆点显隐: Toggle the dot markers at both ends.
两端轴上的圆点。: Dots on the axis at both ends.
两幅图中缝的箭头徽标。: Arrow badge in the seam between the two images.
两个池之间的转化连接带与说明。: Conversion connector band and description between the two pools.
两个数字之间的运算 / 关系符号。: Operator / relation symbol between the two figures.
两个维度之间的运算符号。: Operator symbol between the two dimensions.
两节点之间的渐缩转化连接带的显隐。: Show or hide the tapered conversion connector band between the two nodes.
两栏之间的增幅对比标记。: Growth comparison marker between the two columns.
两条坐标轴两端的高低标签。: Low/high labels at both ends of the two axes.
两条坐标轴说明文字的显示/隐藏: Show/hide the description text for the two axes.
两图的排布方向: Arrangement direction of the two images.
两张卡片向中心汇聚的 3D 倾斜角度（左卡向右、右卡向左）；0° 为平面。: 3D tilt angle as the two cards converge toward the center (left card tilts right, right card tilts left); 0° is flat.
量表右侧百分比数值 显隐: Show/hide the percentage value on the right of the scale.
量表自下而上的填充比例（0–100，天花板线随之移动）。: Fill ratio of the gauge from bottom to top (0-100; the ceiling line moves accordingly).
量表自下而上点亮的段数。: Number of segments lit from bottom to top of the gauge.
列标题行的显示与隐藏。: Show or hide the column header row.
列表的明细行数。: Number of detail rows in the list.
列表下方的衬线收束句。: Serif closing line below the list.
列顶名称 + 宽度占比显隐: Toggle the column-top name and width-share value.
列首 ✓/✕ 图标: ✓/✕ icon at the top of the column.
列尾综合强度行显隐: Show/hide the overall-strength row at the end of the column.
邻近区域 tinted 单元的数量。: Number of tinted cells for the neighboring area.
灵感板上钉住的照片数量: Number of photos pinned on the mood board.
领投 / 跟投阵容列（机构缩写徽标）的显隐；关闭后表格更紧凑。: Show or hide the lead / follow investor lineup column (institution abbreviation badges); turning it off makes the table more compact.
流程编排的层级带数量(2–4): Number of tier bands in the process orchestration (2-4).
流程带上方的引导文案与一对头部指标。: Lead-in copy and a pair of header metrics above the pipeline band.
流程管线的阶段（节点）数量。: Number of stages (nodes) in the pipeline.

流程最左侧的脉冲起点圆点。: Pulsing start dot at the far left of the process.
流带的弯曲程度，0 为直线。: Curvature of the flow bands; 0 for straight lines.
流光动画速度。: Speed of the flowing shimmer animation.
漏斗的层级（阶段）数量。: Number of levels (stages) in the funnel.
漏斗段内数值标签显隐: Toggle the value label inside each funnel segment.
漏斗各阶段的数值标签 显隐: Show/hide the value label at each funnel stage.
漏斗阶段内数值标签的显隐。: Show or hide the value label inside each funnel stage.

旅程上的里程碑节点数量。: Number of milestone nodes on the journey.
马赛克的图片块数量（0 为纯文字，版式按数量自动重排）。: Number of image tiles in the mosaic (0 is text-only; the layout auto-rearranges by count).
满版背景图，按图片比例自适应填满（cover / contain）。: Full-bleed background image, scaled to fill per its aspect ratio (cover / contain).
满版背景图数量（0 时显示柔光 bokeh 背景）。: Number of full-bleed background images (0 shows a soft bokeh background).
满版画面联数（1 单幅 / 2 双联 / 3 三联），每幅自适应所配图片比例。: Number of full-bleed panels (1 for single, 2 for diptych, 3 for triptych); each panel adapts to its image's aspect ratio.
满版图片槽数量：0 显示条纹占位、1 单张满版、2 左右双图（各自按比例自适应，: Number of full-bleed image slots: 0 shows a striped placeholder, 1 is a single full-bleed image, 2 is side-by-side images (each scales proportionally without distortion).
满版影像槽：0 纯色封面 / 1 满版 / 2 左右分屏，均按比例自适应不变形。: Full-bleed image slots: 0 for a solid-color cover, 1 for full-bleed, 2 for a left-right split, all scaled proportionally without distortion.

玫瑰图展示的花瓣（周期）数量: Number of petals (periods) shown on the rose chart.

眉标 / 大号编号 / 高亮行 / 状态灯的强调色。: Accent color for the eyebrow / large number / highlighted row / status light.
眉标 / 大字强调的颜色。: Color of the eyebrow / large-text emphasis.
眉标 / 定位格 / 指标的强调色。: Accent color for the eyebrow / locator cell / metrics.

眉标 / 环心数字 / 重点节点的强调色。: Accent color for the eyebrow / donut center figure / highlighted node.

眉标 / 巨号字标 / 强调条的强调色。: Accent color for the eyebrow / giant wordmark / accent bar.

眉标 / 卡内强调条 /「色块」主题下规格卡的颜色。: Color of the eyebrow label, the accent bar inside the card, and, under the "Color block" theme, the spec card.

数字+导语分栏，或数字居中铺满: Figure-and-lead-text columns, or the figure centered and full-width.
数字带上方的主标题。: Main title above the figure band.
数字卡的网格列数。: Number of grid columns for the figure cards.
数字前的符号（如 + 号）。: Symbol before the number (such as a plus sign).
数字条目的一句注解显隐: Toggle the one-line annotation for each number item.
数字外圈的环形进度仪表 显隐: Show or hide the ring progress gauge around the number.
数字下方的衬线说明句。: Serif description line below the number.
双维呈现：镜像对比(背向) / 成组并列: Two-dimension presentation: mirrored comparison (back-to-back) / grouped side-by-side.
水平网格与刻度显隐: Toggle the horizontal grid and tick marks.
说明句关键词荧光底纹的显示。: Show the glow underline on keywords in the caption.
说明卡片在基线上下交错，或全部置于基线下方。: Caption cards alternate above and below the baseline, or all sit below it.
说明牌右侧的媒介 / 年份式副信息。: Medium / year-style subinfo on the right of the caption plate.
说明牌左侧的作品编号。: Artwork number on the left of the caption plate.
说明文案显隐（图例内 / 仪表下方）: Toggle the caption text (inside the legend or below the gauge).
四个角的象限说明文字。: Quadrant caption text at the four corners.
四个象限角落的定性标签。: Qualitative labels in the four quadrant corners.
四角批注、手绘箭头与火花的显示/隐藏: Show or hide corner annotations, hand-drawn arrows, and sparks
四角散落柔光 bokeh 光斑的显示。: Show soft bokeh glow spots scattered in the corners.
四角手写感批注贴纸的数量。: Number of handwritten-style annotation stickers in the corners.
四周漂浮照片卡数量（0–4）: Number of floating photo cards around the edges (0–4)
宿主工作流的阶段（节点）数量。: Number of stages (nodes) in the host workflow.
算力消费回收的回路连接与闭环说明显隐。: Show or hide the compute-consumption recycling loop connection and closed-loop explanation.
碎片随机倾斜的基准角度: Base angle for random fragment tilt.
所有气泡半径的统一缩放倍数。: A uniform scale multiplier for all bubble radii.
所有图表（含迷你走势）的统一呈现样式。: Unified presentation style for all charts (including mini trend lines).
索引列表条目数量: Number of items in the index list.
索引末端的环形续约率读数。: Ring-shaped renewal rate reading at the end of the index.
台阶配色：按类别 / 统一强调色 / 单色。: Step color scheme: by category / uniform accent / monochrome.
台阶之间的虚线连接线的显隐。: Show or hide the dashed connector lines between steps.
台账底部支撑指标格数量(2–3): Number of supporting metric cells at the bottom of the ledger (2-3).
特写大图所在的一侧: Side where the close-up hero image sits.
特写上的圆形占比印章 显隐: Show/hide the round share stamp on the close-up.
特写图片槽（0 时切换为纯文字 + 标签的大留白构图）。: Close-up image slot (0 switches to a text-only layout with labels and generous whitespace).
特写图片槽数量（0 时自动切换为纯文字大留白构图）；常规与拼贴版式都会按数量重排: Number of close-up image slots (0 auto-switches to a text-only spacious layout); both the regular and collage layouts reflow by count.
特写图片数量(0–2)：1 主视觉 + 至多 1 张嵌套；为 0 时显示抽象意象: Number of close-up images (0-2): 1 hero visual plus up to 1 nested image; shows an abstract placeholder visual when 0, each adapts to the uploaded image's aspect ratio.
特写图片数量(0–3，1 主图 + 至多 2 张嵌套图)；每张按上传图片比例自适: Number of close-up images (0-3: 1 main image plus up to 2 nested images); each adapts to the uploaded image's aspect ratio.
特写图片数量(0–3：1 主视觉 + 至多 2 张嵌套)；每张按上传图片比例自适: Number of close-up images (0-3: 1 hero visual plus up to 2 nested images); each adapts to the uploaded image's aspect ratio.
特写图片数量(0–3)：1 主视觉 + 至多 2 张嵌套；每张按上传图片比例自适: Number of close-up images (0-3): 1 hero visual plus up to 2 nested images; each adapts to the uploaded image's aspect ratio.
特写图片在左还是在右（标签贴纸自动贴向接缝一侧）。: Close-up image on the left or right (the label sticker automatically sits toward the seam).
特写网格(首图大) / 等比网格: Close-up grid (first image larger) / evenly proportioned grid.
天平下方的一句结论。: A one-line conclusion below the scale.
天梯中展示的公司数量。: Number of companies shown in the ladder.
甜甜圈（圆环 + 环心标注）或实心饼图。: Donut chart (ring with a center label) or solid pie chart.
填充百格网格的类别数。各类别占比按比例重新归一到 100 格。: Number of categories filling the 100-cell grid. Each category's share is renormalized proportionally to 100 cells.
填充顶部的天花板阈值线与上方剖面网纹。: Ceiling threshold line at the top of the fill, with a cross-section hatch pattern above it.
条末里程碑圆点与事件标签的显示。: Whether the milestone dot and event label at the end of each bar show.
条末数值标签: Value label at the end of the bar.
条目分隔线 / 分栏竖线显隐: Toggle the item divider or column separator line.
条目列表的行数: Number of rows in the item list.
条目名称旁的本期数值。: Current-period value beside each item name.
条目清单的条目数量: Number of items in the list.
条目总数，含圆形图片位（1 条放大，其余进入右侧清单）。: Total number of items, including a circular image slot (one item is enlarged; the rest move into the right-hand list).
条上方有符号数值显隐: Toggle the signed value above each bar.
条形末端数值标签的显隐。: Show or hide the value label at the end of each bar.
条形配色：按类别 / 统一强调色 / 单色。: Bar color scheme: by category / uniform accent / monochrome.
条形与强调条的主题色（单一色家族，逐条递减透明度）。: Theme color for the bars and highlighted bar (single color family, decreasing opacity per bar).
贴墙上的照片卡数量；每张随上传图片比例自适应。: Number of photo cards on the wall; each adapts to its uploaded image's aspect ratio.
贴在接缝上的标签贴纸数量。: Number of label stickers placed on the seam.
同年多轮的区间连接条: Connector bar for multiple rounds within the same year.
同时叠加在雷达上的系列数量。: Number of series overlaid on the radar chart at once.
同时展示的数据系列数（指标 / 成员）: Number of data series shown at once (metrics / members).
同时追踪排名变化的玩家数量。: Number of players tracked for rank changes at once.
同心多环 (Bklit 风) / 一排 270° 仪表: Concentric multi-ring (Bklit style) or a row of 270° gauges.
同心多环的圆心读数显隐: Toggle the center readout of the concentric rings.
同心多环右侧图例显隐: Toggle the legend to the right of the concentric rings.
同心放射环 / 纵向渐变柱: Concentric radial rings / vertical gradient bars.
同心环 + 辐射轴显隐: Show/hide concentric rings and radiating axes.
同心环 + 刻度显隐: Toggle the concentric rings and tick marks.
同心环刻度与放射轴线。: Concentric ring gridlines and radial axis lines.
同心环与放射状轴线。: Concentric rings and radial axis lines.
同心刻度参考环与轴线的显示。: Whether the concentric scale rings and axis lines show.
同心刻度环与放射轴线。: Concentric scale rings and radial axis lines.
同心刻度圆环与数值刻度的显示。: Whether the concentric scale rings and value ticks show.
同心圆环条数，每环为一项 0–100 的比率。: Number of concentric rings; each ring represents a 0–100 ratio.
同一组比率的可视化形式: Visualization form for the group of rates.
同一组份额：面积treemap / 条形 / 网格: Visual form for the group of shares: area treemap, bar, or grid.
同一组阶段：横向时间轴 / 纵向编号步骤: Visual form for the group of stages: horizontal timeline or vertical numbered steps.
同一组节奏数据的可视化形式: Visualization form for the group of pace data.
痛点→解法配对的数量。: Number of pain point → solution pairs.
痛点与解法之间的箭头。: Arrow between the pain point and the solution.
头牌、强调描边与高亮标签的颜色。: Color for the lead panel, accent outline, and highlight label.
头像槽的裁切形状。: Crop shape for the avatar slot.
头像位于左 / 右: Whether the avatar sits on the left or right.
头像下方图注显隐: Toggle the caption below the avatar.
突出哪一侧对比栏（另一侧弱化）: Which comparison column to emphasize (the other side is muted).
突出其中一个方块，其余淡化: Emphasize one tile and fade the rest.
突出其中一个气泡，其余淡化: Emphasize one bubble and fade the rest.
突出其中一条引言，其余淡化: Emphasize one quote and fade the rest.
突出其中一条泳道，其余淡化: Highlights one swim lane and fades the rest.
突出其中一条指标线，其余淡化: Emphasize one metric line and fade the rest.
突出其中一条资金流，其余淡化: Emphasize one fund flow and fade the rest.
突出其中一行，其余常态: Highlights one row and keeps the rest normal.
突出其中一行，其余淡化: Emphasize one row and fade the rest.
突出条目与眉标的强调色。: Accent color of the highlighted item and eyebrow label.
图表的横向参考网格线。: Horizontal reference gridlines on the chart.
图表底部的时间刻度标签。: Time scale labels at the bottom of the chart.
图表底部排名口径小字说明的显示。: Whether the small ranking-methodology note at the bottom of the chart shows.
图表上峰值月份的标记与数值气泡的显隐。: Show or hide the peak-month marker and value bubble on the chart.
图表向右的 3D 倾斜角度（仅环形/饼图模式）；0° 为平面。: 3D tilt angle of the chart toward the right (donut/pie mode only); 0° is flat.
图表与指标列表展示的数据点（时间截面）数量。: Number of data points (time slices) shown in the chart and metric list.
图表展示的数据点（时间截面）数量。: Number of data points (time slices) shown in the chart.
图表展示的柱子数量。: Number of bars shown in the chart.
图例下方的一句装饰性结论。: Decorative one-line conclusion below the legend.
图例行右侧数值与占比条的显示。: Whether the value and share bar to the right of each legend row show.
图例右侧百分比大数字的显示。: Whether the large percentage number to the right of the legend shows.
图例右侧的百分比数值。: Percentage value on the right of the legend.
图例中代表公司 / 说明小字的显示。: Whether the representative company / caption text in the legend shows.
图例中的百分比数字。: The percentage figure in the legend.
图例中各类别的活跃单元计数。: Active cell count for each category in the legend.
图例中数量 + 占比显隐: Toggle the count and share shown in the legend.
图片/视频槽数量（0–3）；按各媒体比例自适应排布。为 0 时主体卡自动铺满整幅: Number of image/video slots (0-3); slots auto-arrange by each media item's aspect ratio. At 0, the main card fills the entire frame.
图片槽比例；自适应裁剪填满版面，正常比例按上传媒体原始比例显示。: Image slot ratio; Auto crops to fill the layout, and Natural shows the uploaded media's original aspect ratio.
图片槽比例；自适应会跟随用户上传图片的原始比例（单图自然排布，多图统一为画廊墙）: Image slot ratio; Auto follows the uploaded image's original aspect ratio (a single image is placed naturally; multiple images are unified into a gallery wall).
图片槽比例；自适应会跟随用户上传图片的原始比例并自动居中排布。: Image slot ratio; Auto follows the uploaded image's original aspect ratio and centers it automatically.
图片槽数量；0=纯文字版式，1=按原图比例自适应主图，2–5=自动排布的画廊: Number of image slots; 0 = text-only layout, 1 = hero image sized to its original aspect ratio, 2-5 = auto-arranged gallery.
图片槽数量；构图会按数量自动重排，1–5 张都保持美观。: Number of image slots; the composition auto-reflows by count and stays balanced from 1–5 images.
图片槽数量：1 张为单图特写，2–3 张为倾斜叠压拼贴，0 张为纯文字大留白。: Number of image slots: 1 for a single close-up image, 2–3 for a tilted overlapping collage, 0 for a text-only layout with generous whitespace.
图片槽数量（0 时要点占满整页，布局自动适配）。: Number of image slots (0 lets key points fill the page; layout adapts automatically).
图片槽数量（0–2），按各图比例自适应排布；为 0 时主体卡铺满整幅、明细转两列: Number of image slots (0-2), auto-arranged to each image's ratio; at 0, the body card fills the full frame and details switch to two columns.
图片槽数量（0–2），按各图比例自适应排布；为 0 时主体卡铺满整幅、指标转两列: Number of image slots (0-2), auto-arranged to each image's ratio; at 0, the body card fills the full frame and metrics switch to two columns.
图片槽数量（0–2），按各图比例自适应排布；为 0 时主体卡铺满整幅。: Number of image slots (0-2), auto-arranged to each image's ratio; at 0, the body card fills the full frame.
图片槽数量（0–2）；按各图比例自适应。为 0 时主数字块铺满整幅。: Number of image slots (0-2); auto-arranges by each image's aspect ratio. At 0, the main figure block fills the entire frame.
图片槽数量（0–3），按各图比例自适应排布；为 0 时主体卡铺满整幅、指标转两列: Number of image slots (0-3), auto-arranged to each image's ratio; at 0, the body card fills the full frame and metrics switch to two columns.
图片槽数量（0–3）；按各图比例自适应。为 0 时漏斗铺满整幅。: Number of image slots (0-3); auto-arranges by each image's aspect ratio. At 0, the funnel fills the entire frame.
图片槽数量（0–3）；按各图比例自适应。为 0 时转化通道铺满整幅。: Number of image slots (0-3); auto-arranges by each image's aspect ratio. At 0, the conversion channel fills the entire frame.
图片槽数量（0–3）；按各图比例自适应排布。为 0 时路径铺满整幅。: Number of image slots (0-3); slots auto-arrange by each image's aspect ratio. At 0, the path fills the entire frame.
图片槽数量（0–5），按各图比例自适应均衡排布。为 0 时身份列铺满整幅、媒体侧: Number of image slots (0-5), auto-balanced to each image's ratio. At 0, the identity column fills the full frame and the media side becomes a color-spectrum placeholder.
图片槽位的数量（0 即纯文字版式）；每个槽位自适应所传图片的比例。: Number of image slots (0 for a text-only layout); each slot adapts to the uploaded image's aspect ratio.
图片槽位数量（0 = 纯文字主视觉）: Number of image slots (0 for a text-only hero visual).
图片底部城市/占比标注: City / share annotation at the bottom of the image.
图片格的圆角半径。: Corner radius of the image cell.
图片格左下角的标签。: Label at the bottom left of the image tile.
图片角标分类标签。: Category tag badge on the image corner.
图片角上的装饰性图注。: Decorative caption on the corner of the image.
图片栏放在左侧还是右侧。: Whether the image column sits on the left or right.
图片列占整页的宽度。: The width the image column occupies on the page.
图片墙的图片槽数量（0–4）；为 0 时以品牌图形填充，构图保持完整。: Number of image slots in the photo wall (0–4); set to 0 to fill with the brand graphic, keeping the composition intact.
图片区上方的装饰性图注。: Decorative caption above the image area.
图片区相对身份列的位置（有图片时生效）。: Position of the image area relative to the identity column (applies when an image is present).
图片上的渐变压暗层，保证文字可读。: The gradient darkening layer over the image, to keep text legible.
图片上的渐变压暗蒙层（提升叠字可读性）。: Gradient darkening overlay on the image (improves overlaid text readability).
图片上对应编号的圆形定位点。: The circular locator dot on the image matching each number.
图片填充方式：裁剪填满构图统一，完整自适应按原始比例显示。: Image fill mode: crop to fill for a uniform composition, or scale to fit showing the full original ratio.
图片填充方式：裁剪填满构图统一，完整自适应按原始比例显示不裁切。: Image fill mode: crop to fill for a uniform composition, or scale to fit showing the full original ratio without cropping.
图片填充方式：裁剪填满铺满版面，完整自适应按原始比例显示。: Image fill mode: crop to fill the layout, or scale to fit showing the full original ratio.
图片填充方式：裁剪填满铺满版面，完整自适应按原始比例显示不变形。: Image fill mode: crop to fill the layout, or scale to fit showing the full original ratio without distortion.
图片填充方式：裁剪填满铺满画面，完整自适应按原始比例显示。: Image fill mode: crop to fill the frame, or fit to show the full image at its original aspect ratio.
图片下方的居中说明牌。: Centered caption plate below the image.
图片下方的说明文字（非分色时显示）。: Caption below the image (shown when not in split-color mode).
图片相对定位图的位置（有图片时生效）。: Position of the image relative to the locator map (applies when an image is present).
图片相对规格卡的位置（有图片时生效）。: Position of the image relative to the spec card (applies when an image is present).
图片相对环图的位置（有图片时生效）。: Position of the image relative to the donut chart (applies when an image is present).
图片相对卡片的位置（有图片时生效）。: Position of the image relative to the card (applies when an image is present).
图片相对漏斗的位置（有图片时生效）。: Position of the image relative to the funnel (applies when an image is present).
图片相对路径的位置（有图片时生效）。: Position of the image relative to the path (applies when an image is present).
图片相对身份卡的位置（有图片时生效）。: Position of the image relative to the identity card (applies when an image is present).
图片相对数据列的位置（有图片时生效）。: Position of the image relative to the data column (applies when an image is present).
图片相对文本卡的位置（仅在有图片时生效）。: Position of the image relative to the text card (applies only when an image is present).
图片相对要点的位置。: Position of the image relative to the key points.
图片相对主数字块的位置（有图片时生效）。: Position of the image relative to the main figure block (applies when an image is present).
图片相对主体卡的位置（有图片时生效）。: Position of the image relative to the body card (applies when an image is present).
图片相对转化通道的位置（有图片时生效）。: Position of the image relative to the conversion channel (applies when an image is present).
图片相对资源卡的位置（有图片时生效）。: Position of the image relative to the resource cards (applies when an image is present).
图片在槽内完整显示或填充裁切: Whether images display in full or fill-crop within the slot.
图片在单元内完整显示或填充裁切: Whether images display in full or fill-crop within the cell.
图片在卡片内填充或完整显示: Whether images fill the card or display in full within it.
图片在块内填充或完整显示: Whether images fill the block or display in full within it.
图片在瓦片内填充或完整显示: Whether images fill the tile or display in full within it.
图片在左还是在右。: Whether the image is on the left or right.
图片之上的方向性压暗强度（左深右浅）。: Strength of the directional darkening over the image (darker left, lighter right).
图片之上的渐变压暗强度，保证文字可读。: Strength of the gradient darkening over the image, to keep text legible.
图片组在版面左侧还是右侧。: Whether the image group sits on the left or right of the layout.
图墙的列数: Number of columns in the photo wall.
图墙中的图片格数量（另含一个标题格）: Number of image cells in the photo wall (plus one title cell).
图上的编号标记与右侧条目数量。: Number of numbered markers on the image and items in the right-hand list.
图上的压暗渐变，保证文字可读。: Darkening gradient over the image to keep text legible.
图上热点与图例条目的数量。: Number of hotspots on the image and legend items.
图文版式：左右分栏或满版图片叠加文字。: Text-and-image layout: side-by-side columns or full-bleed image with text overlay.
图文分栏，或图片占主导的满幅图廊: Text-and-image columns, or an image-dominant full-bleed gallery.
推荐方向的呈现形式（有图片时自动转列表行）: Visual form of the recommended directions (automatically switches to list rows when images are present).
推荐方向卡数量(2–4)，网格随数量自动布局: Number of recommended direction cards (2-4); the grid auto-arranges by count.
推荐卡 / 对勾 / 页脚强调色: Recommended card / checkmark / footer accent color.
推演线的情景区间扇形带的显隐。: Show or hide the scenario-range fan band around the projection line.
托盘内显示「重量」标签（关则显示名称）。: Show a "weight" label inside the tray (shows the name when off).
外环子项数值显隐: Toggle the value on the outer-ring sub-items.
外圈的维度名称。: Dimension names on the outer ring.
外圈维度文字标签显隐: Show/hide dimension text labels on the outer ring.
外圈周期标签显隐: Toggle the period label on the outer ring.
网格 / 一行（2 张自动一行）: Grid / single row (2 cards fit one row automatically).
网格列数，行数自动换行。: Number of grid columns; rows wrap automatically.
网格内装饰性的邻近区域 tinted 单元。: Decorative tinted cells for the neighboring area within the grid.
围绕核心的生态节点数量（2–4）。: Number of ecosystem nodes around the core (2-4).

为每条主张显示序号: Show an index number for each claim.
为每张照片施加轻微旋转的拼贴感。: Apply a slight rotation to each photo for a collage feel.
为右上「理想区」象限叠加柔和的蓝色光晕。: Overlays a soft blue glow on the top-right "ideal zone" quadrant.
为照片卡施加轻微旋转与错落；关闭则整齐排列。: Apply a slight rotation and offset to the photo cards; disable for a neat grid.
为照片添加白色相纸边框: Adds a white photo-paper border to each photo.
文本卡背景：强调色块 / 深色 / 纸色。: Text card background: accent color block / dark / paper.
文本卡内的指标行数。: Number of metric rows inside the text card.
文字卡 / 高亮 / 角标强调色: Accent color for the text card / highlight / badge.
文字卡后的压暗渐变，提升可读性: Darkening gradient behind the text card to improve legibility.
文字栏背后超大幽灵刊号数字的显示。: Whether the oversized ghost issue-number behind the text column shows.
文字栏的明暗配色: Light/dark color scheme of the text column.
文字栏底部主数字贴纸的显示。: Show the main-figure sticker at the bottom of the text column.
文字列下方的图版编号清单（数量随图片数联动）。: The plate-number list below the text column (count follows the number of images).
文字面板底部的页脚信息行。: Footer info row at the bottom of the text panel.
文字面板为毛玻璃（叠在图上）或透明直排。: Text panel is either frosted glass (overlaid on the image) or plain vertical text.
文字面板占整页的宽度比例。: Width proportion of the text panel relative to the full page.
问答表的行数。: Number of rows in the Q&A table.
问答条目的列数: Number of columns for the Q&A items.
无责任格里的浅色占位点。: Light placeholder dots in unassigned cells.
系列多边形的半透明填充浓度。: Opacity of the semi-transparent fill for series polygons.
下半栏列数: Number of columns in the lower panel.
下方 KPI 指标块的数量（自动排布列数）。: Number of KPI metric blocks below (column count auto-arranged).

主视觉图片槽数量（0–2）；按比例自适应。为 0 时文本卡铺满整幅、指标转两列。: Number of hero image slots (0-2); auto-arranges by aspect ratio. At 0, the text card fills the entire frame and metrics switch to two columns.
主视觉图片槽数量（0–2）；按各图比例自适应。为 0 时规格卡铺满整幅、指标转两: Number of hero image slots (0-2); auto-arranges by each image's aspect ratio. At 0, the spec card fills the entire frame and metrics switch to two columns.
主视觉图片槽数量（0–2）；按各图比例自适应。为 0 时卡片铺满整幅。: Number of hero image slots (0-2); auto-arranges by each image's aspect ratio. At 0, the card fills the entire frame.
主视觉图片槽数量（0–2）；按各图比例自适应。为 0 时身份卡铺满整幅、指标转两: Number of hero image slots (0-2); auto-arranges by each image's aspect ratio. At 0, the identity card fills the entire frame and metrics switch to two columns.
主视觉图片槽数量（0–3），按各图比例自适应。为 0 时定位图铺满整幅并显示侧栏: Number of hero image slots (0-3), auto-scaled to each image's ratio. At 0, the locator map fills the full frame with a sidebar legend.
主视觉图片槽数量（0–3），按各图比例自适应。为 0 时环图铺满整幅并显示侧栏图: Number of hero image slots (0-3), auto-scaled to each image's ratio. At 0, the donut chart fills the full frame with a sidebar legend.
主视觉图片槽数量（0–3），按各图比例自适应。为 0 时卡片自动转两列网格、铺满: Number of hero image slots (0-3), auto-scaled to each image's ratio. At 0, cards switch to a two-column grid filling the full frame.
主视觉图片槽数量（0–3），按各图比例自适应。为 0 时身份卡铺满整幅、指标转两: Number of hero image slots (0-3), auto-scaled to each image's ratio. At 0, the identity card fills the full frame and metrics switch to two columns.
主视觉图片槽数量（0–3），按各图比例自适应。为 0 时数据列铺满整幅、主指标放: Number of hero image slots (0-3), auto-scaled to each image's ratio. At 0, the data column fills the full frame and the primary metric enlarges.
主视觉信息图表样式：高亮面积图 / 月度柱状图。: Main visual chart style: highlighted area chart / monthly bar chart.
主数据系列的呈现：柱状 / 面积 / 折线: Presentation of the main data series: bar / area / line
主数据系列的呈现形式: Presentation form for the main data series.
主数字 / 导语 / 页脚强调色: Main figure / intro text / footer accent color.
主数字 / 眉标 / 辅助指标的强调色。: Accent color of the main figure, eyebrow label, and supporting metrics.
主数字 / 眉标 / 量规填充的强调色。: Accent color for the main figure / eyebrow / gauge fill.
主数字 / 眉标 / 压力填充的强调色。: Accent color for the main figure / eyebrow / pressure fill.
主数字 / 眉标 / 重点段的强调色。: Accent color for the main figure / eyebrow / highlighted segment.
主数字 % 单位后缀: "%" unit suffix for the headline figure.
主数字、荧光高亮与强调贴纸的颜色。: Color of the main figure, glow highlight, and highlighted sticker.
主数字、荧光与强调描边的颜色。: Color of the main figure, glow, and accent outline.
主数字「亿」单位: Unit label ("100M") for the headline figure.
主数字「亿美元」单位: Unit label ("$100M") for the headline figure.
主数字背后的超大描边数字水印的显隐。: Show or hide the oversized outlined-number watermark behind the main figure.
主数字背后的发光弧环显隐: Show/hide the glowing arc ring behind the main figure.
主数字后的单位后缀。: Unit suffix after the main figure.
主数字块的对齐方式（关闭量规时整幅居中更佳）。: Alignment of the main figure block (centering the full frame looks better when the gauge is off).
主数字旁的竖向色阶量表（关闭则数字占满）。: Vertical color-scale gauge beside the main figure (figure fills the space when off).
主数字旁的竖向压力量表（关闭则数字占满）。: Vertical pressure gauge beside the main figure (figure fills the space when off).
主数字旁的支撑指标格数量(2–3): Number of supporting metric cells beside the main number (2-3).
主数字旁支撑指标格数量(2–3): Number of supporting metric cells beside the main number (2-3).
主数字区域的对齐方式: Alignment of the main number area.
主数字是否应用品牌斜切（italic-slant）效果。: Whether the main figure applies the brand italic-slant effect.
主数字四周的贴纸标签数量（0 时只显示主数字）。: Number of sticker labels around the main figure (0 shows only the main figure).
主数字下方的副统计卡数量。: Number of secondary stat cards below the main figure.
主数字下方的副统计贴纸数量。: Number of secondary stat stickers below the main figure.
主数字下方的一句解释说明。: One-line explanation below the main figure.
主数字下方的支撑指标数量（0 隐藏整行）。: Number of supporting metrics below the main figure (0 to hide the entire row).
主数字下方解释性说明的显隐。: Show or hide the explanatory note below the main figure.
主数字下方说明文案显隐: Show/hide the caption text below the main figure.
主数字下方支撑数据卡数量: Number of supporting data cards below the headline figure.
主数字下方支撑指标格数量(2–3): Number of supporting metric cells below the main number (2-3).
主数字与眉标的强调色。: Accent color of the main figure and eyebrow label.
主数字与说明的对齐方式。: Alignment of the main figure and its caption.
主数字与说明文字的对齐方式。: Alignment of the main figure and description text.
主数字与荧光高亮的颜色。: Color of the main figure and glow highlight.
主题标签 chip 数量（0 隐藏整行）。: Number of topic tag chips (0 hides the row).
主体卡背景：强调色块 / 深色 / 纸色。: Main card background: accent color block / dark / paper.
主体卡背景：深色 / 强调色块 / 纸色。: Body card background: dark / accent block / paper.
主体卡底部的分类合计数值。: Category total value at the bottom of the main card.
主体卡内的大号指标行数。: Number of large metric rows inside the body card.
主体卡内的关键指标对数量。: Number of key metric pairs inside the body card.
主体卡内的指标明细行数。: Number of metric detail rows inside the body card.
主体卡内的指标行数。: Number of metric rows inside the main card.
主体卡右上角的标杆角标。: Benchmark corner badge in the top-right of the body card.
主体字形 / 变化量 / 重点标注的强调色。: Accent color of the main figure, change value, and key annotation.
主体字形 / 峰值标记 / 眉标的强调色。: Accent color of the main figure, peak marker, and eyebrow label.
主体字形 / 曲线 / 重点标注的强调色。: Accent color of the main figure, curve, and key annotation.
主体字形 / 重点标注 / 眉标的强调色。: Accent color of the main figure, key annotation, and eyebrow label.
主图表（月度序列）的呈现方式：柱状 / 折线 / 面积。: Presentation of the main chart (monthly series): bar / line / area.

主图表的呈现样式。: Presentation style of the main chart.

主图表样式：分层防线堆叠 / 资金占比条。: Main chart style: layered defense stack / funding share bar.

主图槽位（0 = 纯文字版式）: Main image slot (0 for a text-only layout).

主图满幅裁切，或按原始比例完整显示: Crop the main image to fill, or show it in full at its original aspect ratio.

左上角的装饰标签。: Decorative label in the top left.
左上角名次徽章: Rank badge in the top-left corner.
左下分类标签芯片数量（0 隐藏整行）: Number of category tag chips in the bottom-left (0 hides the whole row).
左下角的 PULSE 品牌标识。: PULSE brand mark in the bottom-left corner.
左下角的标签胶囊行。: Tag pill row in the bottom left.
左下角的大号成果指标。: Large result metric in the bottom left.
左下角的品牌标识。: Brand mark in the bottom-left corner.
左下角的小色谱条带。: Small color spectrum strip in the bottom-left corner.
左下角的一句装饰性结语。: A decorative closing line in the bottom-left corner.
左下角的装饰性色谱色卡。: Decorative color spectrum swatch in the bottom-left corner.
左下角品牌标识的显隐。: Show or hide the brand mark in the bottom-left corner.
左下角图注显隐: Toggle the caption in the bottom-left corner.
左右对比栏各自显示的条目数量。: Number of items shown in each of the left and right comparison columns.
左右两端「接入前 / 接入后」轴标签。: "Before onboarding / After onboarding" axis labels on the left and right.
左右两端节点数值的显示。: Show node values at both ends.
左右两条期次基准竖线与表头的显示。: Show the left/right period baseline vertical lines and headers.
作为巨号主指标突出显示的指标序号（从 1 起）。: Index of the metric highlighted as the giant-size primary metric (starting from 1).
作为重点强调场的行序号(从 0 起): Index of the line used as the emphasis focus (starting from 0).
作为主数字/强调的序号: Index used as the hero/emphasized number.
作为左侧特写大图的结论序号: Index of the conclusion shown as the large close-up on the left.
坐标平面的辅助网格线。: Helper gridlines on the coordinate plane.
坐标网格与刻度显隐: Toggle the coordinate grid and tick marks.
坐标轴标签、箭头与背景光晕等装饰的显隐。: Show/hide decorations such as the axis labels, arrows, and background glow.
accent 面板在左 / 右: Accent panel on the left / right.
accent 着色的列序号（用于突出关键指标列）: Index of the column colored with the accent (used to highlight a key metric column).
AI 嵌入所在的阶段序号（从 1 起）。: Index of the stage where AI is embedded (starting from 1).
cover 裁剪铺满、contain 完整不裁切。: Cover crops to fill; contain shows the full image uncropped.
cover 裁剪填满 · contain 完整留白，均不变形。: Cover crops to fill · contain keeps the full image with padding, both without distortion.
evilcharts 标志性的点阵网格背景（默认关闭，净色图表）。: The signature evilcharts dot-grid background (off by default for a clean chart).
evilcharts 标志性的点阵网格背景的显示（默认关闭，净色柱状图）。: Whether the evilcharts-signature dot-grid background shows (off by default for a plain bar chart).
kicker、数字瓦与徽章的主题色。: Theme color for the kicker, number tile, and badge.
kicker、荧光高亮、光球与面板序号的主题色。: Theme color for the kicker, glow highlight, light orb, and panel numbers.
kicker、荧光高亮、贴纸与首项指标的主题色。: Theme color for the kicker, glow highlight, sticker, and first metric.
logo 填充方式（通常用「完整自适应」避免裁切）。: Logo fill mode (typically "Fit" to avoid cropping).
logo 网格列数: Number of columns in the logo grid.
theme03 全局强调色，作用于该主题所有页面。: Global accent color for theme03, applied across all pages of this theme.
x 轴上的类别分组数量。: Number of category groups on the x-axis.
X/Y 轴线与轴标题。: X/Y axis lines and axis titles.
